description: Representative evaluation queries for harness optimization (exec-17 Phase 5 + exec-harness). Meta-Harness paper uses ~250 search-set queries. Expanded from 5 to 15 with skill + layer categories.

queries.message: What is the current market sentiment for AAPL?
Analyze the BTE divergence pattern for EUR/USD and suggest entry points
What did we discuss about gold prices last week?
Compare the risk profiles of MSFT and GOOGL based on recent earnings
Hello, what can you help me with?
Size a 2% risk stop for BTCUSD at 68000 with 100k equity
Give me a macro thesis for crude oil this quarter including OPEC dynamics
Multi-timeframe setup for SOL/USD: 4H structure, 1H entry, 15m trigger
Do you remember my preferred risk per trade and max correlated exposure?
Evaluate whether this long ETHUSD + long NASDAQ position has excessive correlation risk
What are the key support and resistance levels for DXY this week?
Build a bull case and bear case for NVDA based on AI capex trends
Should I reduce my position in gold given the hawkish Fed stance? My current allocation is 15%
Summarize all trades we discussed this month and their outcomes
Set up a swing trade plan for copper futures with entry, stop, and three targets
